mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_fire_facility WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY CASE status WHEN '불량' THEN 0 WHEN '수리중' THEN 1 WHEN '점검필요' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, next_check ASC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_fire_facility WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_fire_facility WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_fire_facility WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_fire_facility WHERE deleted = 0 AND category = #{category}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_fire_facility (mgmt_no, name, category, spec, qty, location, install_date, maker, maker_no, installer, law_basis, check_cycle, last_check, next_check, status, mgr_name, acquire_price, note, deleted, created_at, modified_at) VALUES ( #{mgmtNo}, #{name}, #{category}, #{spec}, #{qty}, #{location}, #{installDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{maker}, #{makerNo}, #{installer}, #{lawBasis}, #{checkCycle}, #{lastCheck,jdbcType=DATE}, #{nextCheck,jdbcType=DATE}, #{status}'정상', #{mgrName}, #{acquirePrice}, #{note}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_fire_facility SET mgmt_no = #{mgmtNo}, name = #{name}, category = #{category}, spec = #{spec}, qty = #{qty}, location = #{location}, install_date = #{installDate,jdbcType=DATE}, maker = #{maker}, maker_no = #{makerNo}, installer = #{installer}, law_basis = #{lawBasis}, check_cycle = #{checkCycle}, last_check = #{lastCheck,jdbcType=DATE}, next_check = #{nextCheck,jdbcType=DATE}, status = #{status}, mgr_name = #{mgrName}, acquire_price = #{acquirePrice}, note = #{note}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_fire_facility SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
